race.comment: DEMARCATE (2) rarely runs a bad race. Started a move before the corner then kept coming to grab third last start over 1100m at Scone. Bolted in here at this distance three runs ago. Beautifully graded today and gets in nicely after the claim. Looks the goods. SORRENTO PALACE (13) led and held on well for second two back over today's trip at Bathurst. Dropped back to 1100m at Dubbo last time and found that a bit slick. Can return to form without surprising. IVY DIVA (9) did a great job to finish third when resuming over today's journey at Gosford two back. A bit flat at Muswellbrook subsequently but can bounce back. ROTHGATE (3) has been in the money at his last three. Boasts a fine record of three wins and two placings from six tries at 1200m. Draws a lovely gate so must be considered carefully. NOR NOR WEST (5) can improve on a plain first-up effort at Scone.
